description: Dedicated dashboard for per-host-density and scale testing - tracking VM startup times, lifecycle phases, KubeVirt control plane, and cluster infrastructure during VM creation at scale.

targets.query: uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyMeasurement AND jobName.keyword: startup-vms
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyMeasurement AND jobName.keyword: startup-vms
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyQuantilesMeasurement AND jobName.keyword: startup-vms AND quantileName.keyword: VMIRunning
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyMeasurement AND jobName.keyword: startup-vms

panels.title: Startup Throughput
panels.description: VMs successfully started per minute during the startup phase

targets.query: uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyMeasurement AND jobName.keyword: startup-vms
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyMeasurement AND jobName.keyword: startup-vms

panels.title: Startup Spread
panels.description: Time spread between fastest and slowest VM startup (max - min vmiRunningLatency)

targets.query: uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyMeasurement AND jobName.keyword: startup-vms
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyQuantilesMeasurement AND NOT jobName.keyword: shutdown-vms
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyMeasurement AND jobName.keyword: startup-vms AND nodeName.keyword: $worker
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyMeasurement AND jobName.keyword: startup-vms
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyMeasurement AND jobName.keyword: startup-vms
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: vmiLatencyMeasurement AND jobName.keyword: startup-vms
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: nodeCPU AND labels.instance.keyword: $worker
uuid.keyword: $uuid AND metricName.keyword: nodeMemoryAvailable AND labels.instance.keyword: $worker

title: CNV VM Startup Performance
